meta_title: For Founders: passive income to Solve no project ideas (Intermediate Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to passive income and overcome no project ideas. A Intermediate-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Passive Income to Solve No Project Ideas
content.seo_description: Stop staring at a blank screen. Learn to build passive income SaaS products using Antigravity and Claude Code in this intermediate-level founder's tutorial.
content.answer_block: Stop searching for 'the perfect idea' and start building high-utility, micro-SaaS tools that solve specific, boring business problems. By leveraging Antigravity for rapid architectural scaffolding and Claude Code for automated implementation, you can ship revenue-generating MVPs in days, not months, effectively turning code into automated passive income streams.
content.intro:
The blank screen is the silent killer of ambition. Every day you spend 'brainstorming' is a day your competitors are capturing market share with inferior but shipped products. The paralysis of choice isn't a lack of creativity; it’s a failure of framework. You don't need a unicorn idea; you need a repeatable system that transforms high-intent search data into functional, monetizable software.

We are shifting the paradigm from 'idea-first' to 'execution-first.' By integrating Antigravity’s rapid architectural modeling with Claude Code’s autonomous engineering capabilities, we strip away the friction of boilerplate development. This is your blueprint for building lean, automated revenue engines that operate while you sleep, moving you from a dreamer to a founder with a live product.

steps.title: Identify Low-Friction Market Gaps
steps.description: Use data-driven validation to find niches with high search volume but poor existing software solutions. Focus on 'boring' B2B tasks.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze market trends for high-demand, low-competition micro-SaaS niches in the productivity and automation space. Provide 3 specific project ideas with high subscription potential.
steps.claude_code_command: claude research 'current top 100 trending business process automation requests on Reddit and Twitter'

steps.title: Architect the MVP Structure
steps.description: Define the core feature set that delivers immediate value. Avoid feature creep; focus on the single 'Aha!' moment.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a lean architecture for a SaaS that solves [Insert Idea]. Include database schema, API endpoints, and a payment integration strategy for Stripe.

steps.title: Automate Boilerplate with Claude Code
steps.description: Stop writing auth and database boilerplate. Let the AI handle the heavy lifting while you focus on business logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor this base architecture into a modular, production-ready codebase using Next.js and Supabase.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --tasks 'initialize nextjs project, setup supabase auth, implement stripe checkout'

steps.title: Implement Passive Value Delivery
steps.description: Embed AI agents into your flow to ensure the product functions without constant manual oversight.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create an automated workflow that processes user inputs and triggers an email report using AWS SES or Resend.

steps.title: Deploy and Monitor for Revenue
steps.description: Deploy to Vercel and implement telemetry to monitor user behavior and subscription conversion rates.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a deployment script and a monitoring configuration for Vercel and PostHog to track conversion-critical user actions.

pro_tips: Focus on 'pain-killer' apps over 'vitamin' apps; businesses pay for things that save them time or make them money.
Use Claude Code to write unit tests for your payment logic first; never ship code that handles money without 100% coverage.
Implement a 'Waitlist' landing page before building the full product to validate demand with email signups.
Keep your tech stack simple: Next.js + Supabase + Stripe is the gold standard for speed-to-market.
Once the MVP is live, use AI to analyze support tickets to build the next feature that your users are actually asking for.
content.next_steps: After deployment, set up a basic content marketing loop to drive traffic to your landing page and monitor your Stripe dashboard for the first 10 paying customers.
content.conversion_block: Stop building for yourself and start building for the market. By leveraging these tools, you reduce the risk of failure and increase your speed to revenue. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
